subcodes.first_line: O my dearly beloved! The Sun of Truth hath shone forth from the horizon of hopes, dawning from the Dayspring of Glory with most beauteous radiance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنم چوق سودیکم شمس حقیقت مطلع آمالدن طالع و مشرق جلالدن ساطع و الطف جمال
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
